feedback.text: We, as gamers, are asking for a regulation on how service providers from the gaming industry operator inside the EU: * PlayStation's inability to change your registered country * Online services being taken down months after purchasing a game * Switch 2 cartridges not containing the game you pay for * More games demanding online always connection, even for single player gamers * Games being shipped incomplete, and amended with paid content to fix the launch issues. We demand stricter rules on these practises, to protect us as consumers.
